class.name: NavigationPathQueryResult3D
class.brief_description: Represents the result of a 3D pathfinding query.
class.description: This class contains the result of a navigation path query from [method NavigationServer3D.query_path]. Synchronization is required to apply any pending updates for the query result as updates from multithreaded operations can be received at any point. Call [method sync] to apply the pending update at the synchronization point of choice.

method.name: reset
method.description: Reset the result object to its initial state. This is useful to reuse the object across multiple queries.

method.name: sync
method.description: Synchronizes the result with any pending update. Returns [code]true[/code] when the result had a pending update.

members.member: The resulting path array from the navigation query. All path array positions are in global coordinates. Without customized query parameters this is the same path as returned by [method NavigationServer3D.map_get_path].
The [code]ObjectID[/code]s of the [Object]s which manage the regions and links each point of the path goes through.
The [RID]s of the regions and links that each point of the path goes through.
The type of navigation primitive (region or link) that each point of the path goes through.

signal.name: changed
signal.description: Emitted when the result was updated.

signal.name: pending_update
signal.description: Emitted when the result has a pending update e.g. a multithreaded pathfinding calculation has just finished. Call [method sync] to apply the pending update at the synchronization point of choice.

constants.constant: This segment of the path goes through a region.
This segment of the path goes through a link.
